HGSS.707.0001:
Hello, [0103,0000,0000]?\f
What’s wrong?
If you’re nearby, you should come talk\r
in person!
HGSS.707.0002:
Hello, [0103,0000,0000]?\f
What’s wrong?
If you’re nearby, you should come talk\r
to me in person!
HGSS.707.0003:
Hello, [0103,0000,0000]?\f
Try not to overdo it.
Be sure to heal your Pokémon if they\r
are hurt.
HGSS.707.0004:
Hello, [0103,0000,0000]?\f
Try not to overdo it.
Be sure to heal your Pokémon if they\r
are hurt.
HGSS.707.0005:
Oh, [0103,0000,0000]...\f
I just stepped away for a second...
How could...?
HGSS.707.0006:
Oh, [0103,0000,0000]...\f
I just stepped away for a second...
How could...?
HGSS.707.0007:
Hello, [0103,0000,0000]?\f
We’re checking the Egg now. It does
appear to be a Pokémon Egg.\f
We’ll do a few more tests!
HGSS.707.0008:
Hello, [0103,0000,0000]?\f
We’re checking the Egg now. It does
appear to be a Pokémon Egg.\f
We’ll do a few more tests!
HGSS.707.0009:
Hello, [0103,0000,0000]?\f
Did you see my assistant? He’s at the
Poké Mart in Violet City.\f
He’s got something very important, so
be sure to pick it up!
HGSS.707.0010:
Hello, [0103,0000,0000]?\f
Did you see my assistant? He’s at the
Poké Mart in Violet City.\f
He’s got something very important, so
be sure to pick it up!
HGSS.707.0011:
Hello, [0103,0000,0000]?\f
How’s the Egg? Has anything changed?\f
If anything happens, please call.
HGSS.707.0012:
Hello, [0103,0000,0000]?\f
How’s the Egg? Has anything changed?\f
If anything happens, please call.
HGSS.707.0013:
Hey, [0103,0000,0000], this is great news!
A Pokémon hatched from that Egg!\f
I knew that giving that Egg to you,
[0103,0000,0000], was the right thing to\r
do. I just knew it!\f
You should come here and show me what
kind of Pokémon it is!
HGSS.707.0014:
Hey, [0103,0000,0000], this is great news!
A Pokémon hatched from that Egg!\f
I knew that giving that Egg to you,
[0103,0000,0000], was the right thing to\r
do. I just knew it!\f
You should come here and show me what
kind of Pokémon it is!
HGSS.707.0015:
Hello, [0103,0000,0000]?\f
I just made a new discovery.\f
The time it takes for an Egg to hatch
depends on the Pokémon.
HGSS.707.0016:
Hello, [0103,0000,0000]?\f
I just made a new discovery.\f
The time it takes for an Egg to hatch
depends on the Pokémon.
HGSS.707.0017:
Hello, [0103,0000,0000]?\f
It’s still a mystery what kinds of moves
hatched Pokémon have.\f
We’re investigating that now.
HGSS.707.0018:
Hello, [0103,0000,0000]?\f
It’s still a mystery what kinds of moves
hatched Pokémon have.\f
We’re investigating that now.
HGSS.707.0019:
Hello, [0103,0000,0000]?\f
There’s something strange on
the radio.\f
Is something happening in Goldenrod?
HGSS.707.0020:
Hello, [0103,0000,0000]?\f
There’s something strange on
the radio.\f
Is something happening in Goldenrod?
HGSS.707.0021:
Hello, is this [0103,0000,0000]?\f
Just one more Badge to go before you
collect all the Johto Badges!\f
Blackthorn’s Gym Leader is said to be a
pretty powerful Dragon Tamer!
HGSS.707.0022:
Hello, is this [0103,0000,0000]?\f
Just one more Badge to go before you
collect all the Johto Badges!\f
Blackthorn’s Gym Leader is said to be a
pretty powerful Dragon Tamer!
HGSS.707.0023:
Hello, [0103,0000,0000]?
You seem to be doing well.\f
You’ve done so well, I have nothing to
worry about for you.\f
I think you could do anything you try!
HGSS.707.0024:
Hello, [0103,0000,0000]?
You seem to be doing well.\f
You’ve done so well, I have nothing to
worry about for you.\f
I think you could do anything you try!
HGSS.707.0025:
Hello, [0103,0000,0000]?\f
I have something here for you from
Professor Oak.\f
Could you swing by my Lab?
See you later!
HGSS.707.0026:
Hello, [0103,0000,0000]?\f
I have something here for you from
Professor Oak.\f
Could you swing by my Lab?
See you later!
HGSS.707.0027:
Hello, [0103,0000,0000]?\f
There are so many different ways that
Pokémon evolve, aren’t there?!\f
Some Pokémon don’t even evolve until
they meet certain conditions first!
HGSS.707.0028:
Hello, [0103,0000,0000]?\f
There are so many different ways that
Pokémon evolve, aren’t there?!\f
Some Pokémon don’t even evolve until
they meet certain conditions first!
HGSS.707.0029:
Hello, [0103,0000,0000]?\f
I expect that there are some Pokémon
in the Kanto region that I don’t know.\f
There are probably also methods of
evolution that I’m not familiar with yet.\f
I should use that perspective and
discover what I can!
HGSS.707.0030:
Hello, [0103,0000,0000]?\f

in the Kanto region that I don’t know.\f
There are probably also methods of
evolution that I’m not familiar with yet.\f
I should use that perspective and
discover what I can!
HGSS.707.0031:
Hello, [0103,0000,0000]?\f
It seems that Pokémon that have been
infected with Pokérus level up better.\r
We’re not quite sure why...
HGSS.707.0032:
Hello, [0103,0000,0000]?\f
It seems that Pokémon that have been
infected with Pokérus level up better.\r
We’re not quite sure why...
HGSS.707.0033:
H-hello? [0103,0000,0000]?\f
It’s a disaster!
Uh, um, it’s just terrible!\f
What should I do?
It... Oh, no...\f
Please get back here now!
HGSS.707.0034:
H-hello? [0103,0000,0000]?\f

Uh, um, it’s just terrible!\f

It... Oh, no...\f
Please get back here now!
HGSS.707.0035:
Hello, [0103,0000,0000]?
We’ve discovered something!\f
The details are...well, I can’t really
say anything, but we want you to carry\r
that Egg!\f
My assistant is at the Poké Mart in
Violet City. Could you go meet him and\r
pick up that Egg?
HGSS.707.0036:
Hello, [0103,0000,0000]?
We’ve discovered something!\f
The details are...well, I can’t really
say anything, but we want you to carry\r
that Egg!\f
My assistant is at the Poké Mart in
Violet City. Could you go meet him and\r
pick up that Egg?
HGSS.707.0037:
[0103,0000,0000], how are things going?\f
I called because something weird is
happening with the radio broadcasts.\f
They were talking about Team Rocket.\f
[0103,0000,0000], do you know anything
about it?\f
Maybe Team Rocket has returned.
No, that just can’t be true.\f
Sorry to bug you. Take care!
HGSS.707.0038:

HGSS.707.0039:
Hello, [0103,0000,0000]?
How’s it going?\f
I’ve gotten hold of something neat.
Swing by my Lab and pick it up!\f
See you later!

Hello, [0103,0000,0000]?

HGSS.707.0041:
Hello, [0103,0000,0000]?\f
I have something here for you.
Could you swing by my Lab?\f
See you later!
HGSS.707.0042:
Hello, [0103,0000,0000]?\f
I have something here for you.
Could you swing by my Lab?\f
See you later!
HGSS.707.0043:
Hello, [0103,0000,0000]?\f
I discovered an odd thing.
Apparently there’s something called\r
Pokérus that infects Pokémon.\f
Yes, it’s like a virus, so it’s
called Pokérus.\f
It multiplies fast and infects other
Pokémon, too. But that’s all.\f
It doesn’t seem to do anything, and
it goes away over time.\f
I guess it’s nothing to worry
about. Bye!
